problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
